song.title: Unashamed Love
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C E
song.lyrics:
[v1] . F 1) You're callin' me to lay aside . A# The worries of my day . Dm To quiet down my busy mind .A# Find a resting place [v2] . 2) I open up my heart and let My spirit worship Yours I open up my mouth And let a song of praise come forth [c] Chorus . F A# F A# Worthy You are worthy [b] Bridge .F Of a childlike faith . A# And of my honest praise . Dm A# And of my unashamed love .F Of a holy life . A# And of my sacrifice . Dm A# And of my unashamed love
[E] 1) You're callin' me to lay aside The worries of my day To quiet down my busy mind Find a resting place 2) I open up my heart and let My spirit worship Yours I open up my mouth And let a song of praise come forth Chorus Worthy You are worthy Bridge Of a childlike faith And of my honest praise And of my unashamed love Of a holy life And of my sacrifice And of my unashamed love
